name: TDD-STATE-MACHINE-BACKLOG-4
title: Test gap closures: malformed feature.json, --spec-no-change-reason errors, enforcement-check actual invocation
description:
Add missing test coverage:
1. read_state returning (None, 2) on malformed feature.json (tdd-step.py:120-131).
2. --spec-no-change-reason argparse error branches (empty reason, missing value).
3. _run_enforcement_checks actually invoking checks (current tests only grep source).
4. _post_test_green_hooks project-consolidate path with project-map.json fixture.
5. tdd-context.py exit 2 on missing/malformed feature.json.
6. tdd-drift-check.py handling of missing test/run.py.
